source.policy: Mine medal list and images from original data first. Do not generate replacement medal art when original medal images are present; generated art is only a blocked fallback for missing data.

generationPolicy.fallbackCondition: generation may be reconsidered only after mining proves a required original image is absent

imperialEmblem.exactnessPolicy: The supplied double-eagle crest is canonical reference for remastering. Preserve the full silhouette and internal structure; no simplified/generated substitute is acceptable.
